label: Road
description: Defines a road type that can appear on the world map, including its generation passes, world map rendering layers, movement cost, and pathing behavior.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Rendering and override priority. When world tiles overlap, the road with the highest priority is used for movement cost and visuals.

ancientOnly.label: Ancient only
ancientOnly.description: When true, this road type only appears on worlds generated with ancient ruins enabled and cannot be built by players.

movementCostMultiplier.label: Movement cost multiplier
movementCostMultiplier.description: Multiplier applied to caravan travel time when moving through this road type. Values below 1.0 increase speed; shipped roads use 0.5 for 2x speed.

tilesPerSegment.label: Tiles per segment
tilesPerSegment.description: Number of map tiles in a single road segment during map generation. Higher values produce more evenly distributed road terrain.

pathingMode.label: Pathing mode
pathingMode.description: RoadPathingDef controlling how caravans interact with this road. Avoid keeps caravans on the road; Bulldoze clears obstacles when entering.

roadGenSteps.label: Road gen steps
roadGenSteps.description: Ordered list of generation passes applied when this road crosses a map tile. Steps run in list order and use the Class attribute to select the concrete subclass.

worldRenderSteps.label: World render steps
worldRenderSteps.description: Ordered list of rendering passes that stack visually to draw this road on the world map. Earlier steps render below later steps.

worldTransitionGroup.label: World transition group
worldTransitionGroup.description: Identifier used to group roads for world map transition blending. Roads in the same group blend together at tile borders. Not localized.

distortionFrequency.label: Distortion frequency
distortionFrequency.description: Spatial frequency of the noise used to distort road edges on the world map. Higher values produce finer, more jagged edges.

distortionIntensity.label: Distortion intensity
distortionIntensity.description: Amplitude of the world map edge distortion. Zero produces straight-edged roads; shipped roads use 0.1 to 0.2.

new-road.label: New road
new-road.description: Basic road with standard movement speed and dirt-path style generation.

new-ancient-road.label: New ancient road
new-ancient-road.description: Ancient-only road with bulldoze pathing, matching the asphalt road style.
